name.family_name_note: Kankatala is the family surname, placed first in South Indian naming convention

headline: Computer Science & Engineering Student | AI Systems Builder | Product-Minded Engineer

bio.short: B.Tech CSE student at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham building scalable AI systems, offline-first mobile apps, and real-world automation solutions. Bridges high-tier software engineering with ground-level operational reality.
bio.long: Kankatala Ganesh Giridhar is a B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering student at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Coimbatore (2024–2028), maintaining a CGPA of 8.36/10. Raised in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, he combines rigorous academic foundations (96.17% SSC, 96.5% Intermediate) with hands-on systems building across AI workflows, full-stack development, and mobile engineering. His flagship project, RiceAgent Pro, automates his family's rice distribution business with an offline-first Flutter architecture. He has participated in hackathons at IIT Madras (Shaastra), IIT Kharagpur, and multiple national-level competitions. Through Amrita's Live-in-Labs program, he designed a community-led water purification system for Nediamanickam village using Human-Centered Design methodologies. He operates on a linear paradigm of consistent, systems-oriented growth—rejecting dramatic turning points in favor of recursive self-improvement.

jee.reflection: Metabolized as a learning architecture, not an identity collapse

fun_facts: Built RiceAgent Pro to automate his own family's rice distribution business — real users, real stakes.
Designed a water purification system for a rural Tamil Nadu village during a Live-in-Labs field research program.
Scored 577/600 (96.17%) in Class X SSC exams — received ₹10,000 and public recognition.
Has two uncles based in Australia — one in Sydney (business) and one in Melbourne (IT).
Born in Nidadavolu (maternal hometown) but raised entirely in Visakhapatnam.
Aesthetic preference gravitates toward cyberpunk atmospheres — midnight blues, neon contrasts, and glass morphism.
Competed in hackathons at IIT Madras (Shaastra) and IIT Kharagpur as a first/second-year student.
Processed 156 items in a single GST data automation workflow using n8n.

father.name: Kankatala Narayana Murthy
father.significance: Primary inspiration for RiceAgent Pro. Family business grounding.

family.family_values: Deeply anchored in family respect and sacrifice. Family provides emotional grounding and real-world context for technology projects.

core_identity_traits: Systems-oriented thinker who decomposes complexity into architecture
Linear executor — believes in consistent, compounding growth over dramatic turning points
Builder, not just a consumer — every project solves a real problem
Recursive self-improver driven by the Input→Process→Output→Feedback loop
AI-native cognition — thinks in pipelines, agents, and orchestration
Human-grounded despite technical intensity — anchored by family and rural reality

aesthetic_preferences.ui_philosophy: Clean information density meets dramatic visual impact. Functional beauty over decorative noise.
